fields.name: pay_period_start_date
fields.description: First day of the pay period in ISO format. Used to derive the reporting month.

fields.name: pay_period_end_date
fields.description: Last day of the pay period in ISO format.

fields.name: pay_date
fields.description: Date the employee was paid.

fields.name: current_gross_pay
fields.description: Total gross earnings for the current pay period before deductions. Used to populate the income activity.

fields.name: current_net_pay
fields.description: Take-home pay after all deductions for the current pay period.

fields.name: current_total_deductions
fields.description: Total deductions withheld during the current pay period.

fields.name: ytd_gross_pay
fields.description: Year-to-date gross earnings before deductions.

fields.name: ytd_net_pay
fields.description: Year-to-date net (take-home) pay.

fields.name: ytd_federal_tax
fields.description: Year-to-date federal income tax withheld.

fields.name: ytd_state_tax
fields.description: Year-to-date state income tax withheld.

fields.name: ytd_city_tax
fields.description: Year-to-date city/local income tax withheld.

fields.name: ytd_total_deductions
fields.description: Year-to-date total deductions.

fields.name: regular_hourly_rate
fields.description: Employee's regular hourly rate of pay.

fields.name: holiday_hourly_rate
fields.description: Employee's holiday or premium hourly rate of pay.

fields.name: federal_filing_status
fields.description: Employee's federal tax filing status (e.g. Single, Married).

fields.name: state_filing_status
fields.description: Employee's state tax filing status.

fields.name: employee_number
fields.description: Employer-assigned employee identification number.

fields.name: payroll_number
fields.description: Payroll run or check number.

fields.name: currency
fields.description: ISO 4217 currency code for all monetary amounts on the payslip (e.g. USD).

fields.name: employee_name.first_name
fields.description: Employee's first (given) name.

fields.name: employee_name.middle_name
fields.description: Employee's middle name or initial.

fields.name: employee_name.last_name
fields.description: Employee's last (family) name.

fields.name: employee_name.suffix_name
fields.description: Employee's name suffix (e.g. Jr., Sr., III).

fields.name: employee_address.line1
fields.description: First line of the employee's mailing address.

fields.name: employee_address.line2
fields.description: Second line of the employee's mailing address (apt, suite, etc.).

fields.name: employee_address.city
fields.description: City of the employee's mailing address.

fields.name: employee_address.state
fields.description: State/territory abbreviation of the employee's mailing address.

fields.name: employee_address.zipcode
fields.description: ZIP or postal code of the employee's mailing address.

fields.name: company_address.line1
fields.description: First line of the employer's business address.

fields.name: company_address.line2
fields.description: Second line of the employer's business address.

fields.name: company_address.city
fields.description: City of the employer's business address.

fields.name: company_address.state
fields.description: State/territory abbreviation of the employer's business address.

fields.name: company_address.zipcode
fields.description: ZIP or postal code of the employer's business address.

fields.name: federal_taxes.item_description
fields.description: Label for a federal tax line item (e.g. Federal Income Tax).

fields.name: federal_taxes.period
fields.description: Current period amount for a federal tax line item.

fields.name: federal_taxes.ytd
fields.description: Year-to-date amount for a federal tax line item.

fields.name: state_taxes.item_description
fields.description: Label for a state tax line item.

fields.name: state_taxes.period
fields.description: Current period amount for a state tax line item.

fields.name: state_taxes.ytd
fields.description: Year-to-date amount for a state tax line item.

fields.name: city_taxes.item_description
fields.description: Label for a city/local tax line item.

fields.name: city_taxes.period
fields.description: Current period amount for a city/local tax line item.

fields.name: city_taxes.ytd
fields.description: Year-to-date amount for a city/local tax line item.
